name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

interface.shortDescription: Production-grade engineering skills covering every phase of the SDLC
interface.longDescription: 23 skills spanning the full development lifecycle: Define (spec, interview-me, idea-refine) → Plan → Build (TDD, incremental, context-engineering) → Verify → Review (code-review, security, performance) → Ship. Includes 7 slash commands and 3 agent personas.
defaultPrompt: Use spec-driven-development to define what we're building.
Run the test-driven-development workflow for this feature.
